note: Real source across findroid's setup/data/core modules, fetched at the pinned commit by harness/fetch_vendored.py into corpus/.cache/ (never checked in). files maps upstream path -> app-relative destination. Pinned right before a real repo-wide ktfmt reformat commit (8102dbc, 2025-12-25, 'chore: replace ktlint with ktfmt') so edits 01-03 replay that commit's per-file reformatting -- whitespace/formatting-only, not behavioral, called out honestly in each edit's meta.json (findroid's actual behavioral edit history for these specific files sits further back than a practical shallow-clone-plus-targeted-fetch window could reach in this session; the ktfmt commit is real and self-contained, unlike forcing a synthetic edit). findroid's models/FindroidItem.kt (the natural richer domain type) was deliberately excluded: it depends on ServerDatabaseDao (a Room DAO) and JellyfinRepository (a large interface), which pull in org.jellyfin.sdk types transitively -- unlike KISS/AntennaPod's utility layers, findroid's real domain model does not isolate into a small acyclic subgraph without a much larger vendoring effort. That is itself the corpus finding for findroid: real multi-module apps with a DB+repository-centric model layer resist the narrow-subgraph technique that works for utility-heavy apps.
